BREVO SETTINGS
Connect Brevo to send emails automatically when you click Send
🔑 Your Brevo API Key
1. Go to brevo.com → Create a free account (takes 2 minutes)
2. Go to Account → SMTP & API → API Keys → Generate
3. Copy the key and paste it below — then emails send automatically!
🆓 Brevo free plan: 300 emails/day, unlimited contacts.
📧 Your sender email: [email protected] (update below if different)
Once connected, clicking "Send Newsletter" will email your entire list automatically — no CSV export needed.
